_meta.description: Official source files needed to raise dashboard coverage, that CANNOT be auto-fetched from this environment. Each row is a precise manual download. Honesty rule: no unofficial-source workarounds - blocked sources are marked source_blocked with exact steps.
_meta.environment_block: This sandbox's network policy is an allowlist: package registries are reachable (pypi.org 200, registry.npmjs.org 200, github 301) but every insurance/IRDAI domain returns HTTP 403 (starhealth.in, irdai.gov.in, transactions.nivabupa.com, cms.careinsurance.com, icicilombard.com) - and so does example.com. Official disclosures therefore cannot be fetched here; they must be downloaded manually or fetched by an egress-enabled CI run.
_meta.drop_path_convention: data/raw/company-filings/<company_id>/<period>/  -- after dropping, run: python3 scripts/excel/build_filings_inventory.py ; npx tsx scripts/ingest/fetch-company-filings.ts ; python3 scripts/excel/build_value_store.py ; python3 scripts/excel/fill_template.py ; python3 scripts/excel/qa_checks.py
_meta.accuracy_rules: Stage PUBLIC-DISCLOSURE NL-forms only. No investor-PPT values. No annual-report fused tables (deferred). Staged values still pass every eligibility/basis/scope/column/conflict gate before any cell is filled.
_meta.checksum_note: checksum_sha256 is null until the file is staged; build_filings_inventory.py computes it and source-locks it on staging.

data.document_title: Star Health & Allied Insurance - Website Public Disclosures (NL-20 Analytical Ratios + NL-1..NL-25 schedules)
data.alternative_official_source: IRDAI Business Analytics / public-disclosure portal (bap.irdai.gov.in) -> General Insurers -> Star Health
data.blocked_reason: starhealth.in returns HTTP 403 from this sandbox (egress allowlist). Already present in filings-inventory as declared_pending; not auto-fetchable here.
data.unlocks_detail: Star claims_ratio_igaap, combined_ratio_igaap, solvency_ratio, expense_ratio_igaap across FY23-FY26 + H1FY25/H1FY26 + Q4FY25/Q4FY26 (SAHIs comparison sheet). Highest single coverage win; column-aware NL-20 parser already handles this layout.
manual_steps: Under 'Public Disclosures', download the quarterly 'Periodic/Public Disclosures' PDF for each period (FY25 year-end + Sep-2024, Dec-2024, Jun/Sep/Dec-2025).

data.document_title: Care Health Insurance - Public Disclosure, year ended 31-Mar-2023 (Q4 FY23 / 'Qtr 4 22-23'), NL-20 Analytical Ratios
data.alternative_official_source: careinsurance.com -> About Us -> Financial Information -> Public Disclosures (archive)
data.blocked_reason: cms.careinsurance.com returns HTTP 403 from this sandbox. The FY23 year-end disclosure is NOT staged (Care's staged year-end 'Qtr 4' files stop at FY21; FY24/FY25/FY26 came from loose recent files). FY23 cannot be derived from any staged file's prior-year column.
data.unlocks_detail: Care claims_ratio_igaap FY23 (AC19), combined_ratio_igaap FY23 (AC21), solvency_ratio FY23 (AC32). The 31-Mar-2023 filing's YTD column gives full-year FY23; its prior column also confirms FY22.
manual_steps: Open the Care public-disclosure archive and locate the disclosure for the quarter/period ended 31-Mar-2023 (FY23 year-end).
Download the NL-20 'Analytical Ratios' schedule PDF (decimal layout, already supported).
Save as data/raw/company-filings/care-health/FY23/PublicDisclosure_FY23.pdf and re-run the pipeline.

data.document_title: ICICI Lombard - recent company-TOTAL public disclosure / NL-20 (non-segmental)
data.alternative_official_source: IRDAI public-disclosure portal -> General Insurers -> ICICI Lombard
data.blocked_reason: icicilombard.com returns HTTP 403. The only staged ICICI public disclosure (Q3FY23) is the SEGMENTAL NL-20 variant (blocked by the column-aware parser - no standalone/YTD grid).
data.unlocks_detail: LOW PRIORITY: the current schema has NO ICICI ratio bindings, so this unlocks 0 dashboard cells today. Fetch only if ICICI is added as a peer column. Must be the company-total (not per-segment) NL-20 to be clean.
manual_steps: Only needed if ICICI is added to the dashboard as a peer.
Download a recent company-TOTAL public-disclosure NL-20 (not the per-segment variant) and drop into data/raw/company-filings/icici-lombard/<period>/.

not_a_download_gap.detail: Niva FY24-25 Annual Report IS staged (data/raw/companies/niva-bupa/niva-bupa-Annual-Report-FY-2024-25.pdf). These figures live in annual-report fused tables, whose parsing is explicitly deferred (2D rule 2). This is a PARSER gap, not a download gap. NL-1 'Revenue Account' premium extraction is the cleaner future path.
FY26 ended 31-Mar-2026; the FY26 annual report is not yet published. FY26 quarter/9M ratios already filled from staged NL-forms where the cell exists.
Indian SAHIs file IGAAP, not IFRS. 63 IFRS-basis cells have no public official source and should remain blank (recommend reclassifying from 'available').
